post.description: Creates a user + organisation and returns an access token. The refresh token is set as the `crossbill_rt` httpOnly cookie.
Returns an access token and sets the `crossbill_rt` httpOnly refresh cookie.

get.description: Redirects the browser to the Google consent screen. Open this in a browser, not via fetch.
Google redirects here. Sets the refresh cookie and redirects to the app with the access token in the URL fragment.

post.description: Reads the `crossbill_rt` cookie, rotates the refresh token and returns a fresh access token.
Revokes refresh tokens for the user and clears the refresh cookie.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's business profile (no password hash).

patch.description: Update business details used to render compliant invoices.

post.description: Records a pending invite (delivery wired in the v2 Teams phase).

get.description: Paginated list of clients in the caller's organisation.

post.description: Creates a foreign or domestic client.

get.description: Paginated list of invoices in the organisation.

post.description: Creates an export or domestic invoice. Number, FX rate, tax breakup and FEMA due date are computed server-side.

get.description: Export invoices grouped by days-to-realisation bucket against the FEMA deadline.

patch.description: Only the status may change; financial fields are immutable.

get.description: Returns the generated PDF url, or 404 while generation is still queued.

404.description: PDF not ready yet; generation is queued

parameters.name: invoiceId
parameters.description: Invoice id to list remittances for

post.description: Attach the bank FIRC document (PDF or image, max 10 MB) to a remittance.

get.description: Streams the stored FIRC document inline (bypasses the JSON envelope).

404.description: FIRC not found for this remittance

post.description: Runs the FEMA aging sweep synchronously (OWNER only) and reports what reminders it queued.

get.description: Returns the GSTR-1 Table 6A dataset for the given financial year.
Streams a ZIP of all invoices, FIRC documents and LUT reference for the financial year.
Checks MongoDB and the PDF service dependency.

503.description: The Health Check is not successful

info.title: Crossbill API
info.description:
Crossbill backend API — GST / FEMA compliant invoicing & remittance for Indian exporters.

**Conventions**
- Base path: `/api/v1`
- Success envelope: `{ "success": true, "data": ... }` (list endpoints add a `meta` object).
- Error envelope: `{ "success": false, "error": { "code", "message", "correlationId" }, "timestamp", "path" }`.
- Auth: send `Authorization: Bearer <accessToken>` (obtained from `/auth/login` or `/auth/register`).
- The refresh token is delivered as the `crossbill_rt` httpOnly cookie and is read automatically by `/auth/refresh`.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Registration, login, Google OAuth, token refresh & logout

tags.name: Profile
tags.description: Current user business profile (GSTIN, LUT, bank details)

tags.name: Invoices
tags.description: Export & domestic invoices, PDF and FEMA aging

tags.name: Remittances
tags.description: Inward remittances and FIRC / e-FIRA documents

tags.name: Reports
tags.description: GSTR-1 Table 6A export and compliance bundles

access-token.description: Paste the accessToken returned by /auth/login or /auth/register.

cookie.name: crossbill_rt
cookie.description: httpOnly refresh-token cookie set by the auth endpoints; used by /auth/refresh.

email.description: Email address to register the account under (must be unique)

legalName.description: Registered legal/business name used on invoices

defaultSac.description: Default SAC code applied to invoice items

lutNumber.description: LUT (Letter of Undertaking) number for zero-rated exports

email.description: Email address of the person to invite

role.description: Role to grant the invited member

country.description: Foreign clients only — 2-letter ISO country code

stateCode.description: Domestic clients only — GST state code

customerType.description: Domestic clients only — B2B (registered) or B2C (unregistered)

gstin.description: Required for domestic B2B clients — 15-character GSTIN

country.description: Foreign clients only — 2-letter ISO country code

stateCode.description: Domestic clients only — GST state code

customerType.description: Domestic clients only — B2B (registered) or B2C (unregistered)

gstin.description: Required for domestic B2B clients — 15-character GSTIN

unitAmount.description: Unit amount in the invoice currency

gstRate.description: GST rate % (domestic only). Ignored for export invoices.

clientId.description: Id of an existing client to bill

invoiceDate.description: Invoice date (ISO 8601). Defaults to today when omitted.

currency.description: Invoice currency. Required for export; domestic invoices are forced to INR by the server.

status.description: New invoice status. Financial fields cannot be changed once captured.

invoiceId.description: Id of the invoice this remittance settles

amountReceived.description: Amount received in the remittance currency

purposeCode.description: RBI purpose code for the inward remittance
